storyInfo: Determined rebels Gordon and Sky break Nasti out, but Maylander agents are already on the move. Strangely, after the agents detonate the bombs, the pods do not fall, but are gripped firmly by Rhine Lab's 'tree'.

attributes.content: Platform 3 secondary patrol complete. Target pod in position, no suspicious individuals detected.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: There's no one else left on this little platform but us. What's the sitch on your end?
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: The four pods' engines have undergone breakpoint testing, and the park's about to enter the intercity net's range.
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: Remember the official line to the public: The gathering is only temporary, and they can all return to their respective exhibit areas once the broadcast's intro segment is done.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: Understood.
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: You sure everyone's gone on your end? The Tin Man stressed we had to make sure all park personnel are safely evacuated before we send the operation signal.
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: The main road was sealed off an hour ago, the support platform's emergency jump pads are all shut, and the cable car routes were all diverted to only go in one direction last night, so no one's been able to get in.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: Better play it safe...
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: Ropeway station needs backup. That Rhine research assistant is blocking the access hub with a group of testers, and it's hard to get around them...
attributes.name: Communicator

attributes.content: Gah, go back them up. It's crucial we time this right, every preparatory step has to be complete before the broadcast begins.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: What was that...?
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: Look, over here.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: A soda bottle cap?
attributes.name: Agent B

attributes.content: Probably rolled off the table from the floating pod shaking. It's probably nothing, let's go.
attributes.name: Agent A

attributes.content: Phew... M-Mr. Aspen...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What on earth is your obsession with that balloon?! The couch is small enough without you hanging onto that, I almost got squished flat!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I'm sorry, Miss Barn... but I begged you to take me here just for this balloon...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: You have no idea how much effort it took slipping right out from under their noses and then getting you here!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Really sorry about that... could you hand me the toolbox from the closet? The evacuation announcement came so suddenly, I didn't have the time to make sure the floating pods would be alright during the stream...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: You want the Lucky Cystybeast on display at the expo that badly?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Ignoring a public hearing, signing a temp contract with a tour guide with multiple charges under her belt, and helping her escape park security just so you can have her bring you back to a sealed-off levitation layer...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You guys! All nuts for the sky!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I'm drowning in debt here. The only way to clear it is to have the Lucky Cystybeast at the show and draw in investors.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Yeah, yeah. 'The sky will answer every future seeker', and all that jazz. Propeller Paradise's slogan is plastered all over the place, trashcan lids in the slums included.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Even if it's blind faith, I'm not going to give up now after coming this far.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Phew... nothing wrong with the components. They'll last till the show ends. Let's go.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Why's the door locked?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Wait, did you hear that?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I did... don't tell me something's really up with my product?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: No, I don't mean the exhibit. From—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Under our feet?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Grr, why isn't the line moving? Drag this out any longer and the broadcast is gonna start!
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: Calm down, Maylander guys are on their way to handle it... they've got someone surrounded. Seems like a Rhine Lab researcher, judging by the uniform?
attributes.name: Curious Tester

attributes.content: Let me through! The tree's hard drive and motherboard haven't been removed yet—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Don't push your luck!
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Allowing the Rhine tree at the expo has been our biggest concession to Rhine Lab, and we've even been so generous as to let you copy the data for future research. What more do you want?
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: I just need five minutes! I promise I won't pull any tricks either! Hasn't the ATAO's Science Consultant issued a report on the tree? It's completely harmless!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: No. All levitation layer personnel are to return to the ground to ensure the exhibits are finalized, and only return after the opening speech.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Besides, the uplink cable cars aren't operating now, so there's no way you can reach the Rhine tree. It's at the highest point in the park.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: I didn't realize how much effort Director Lunorey put into this experiment until I saw the core code, and now I remember, how she never abandoned her dreams for the sky...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Even if it only saves a little backtracking time later, I want to help her somehow... you have to let me through!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Mr. Jagger, one more move and we'll have to resort to more special methods.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Wait... the tree looks strange.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You used the same excuse ten minutes ago.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: No, no! It really looks weird! Look for yourself!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.text: The expo is about to open, with the Columbian sun shining brightly. The crowd follows Sky's finger, and spots a dazzling tree.

The branches wrapped in special material should have been completely still, like tiny insects trapped in resin. However, right here and now under the sunlight, the broken branches seem to glow... green.

attributes.content: Organic materials don't photosynthesize...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The park handbook states clearly it is common for exhibits to transform in high-altitude environments.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Rhine stuff doesn't do that.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: And it doesn't give you an excuse to go back up there.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Going up there won't solve the problem, I have no idea what exactly's going on...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But I know who does.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Huh? He just left, that easily?
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: ...Levitation layer, eleven main platforms, and twenty support platforms have been inspected...
attributes.name: Communicator

attributes.content: ...Jammers and backup detonators have been installed in nine smaller levitation pods, which will crash one-by-one when activated...
attributes.name: Communicator

attributes.content: ...Personnel evacuation is complete. Scouts have done multiple calculations of the fallout curve based on current wind direction and force, and have confirmed falling debris will not reach the square serving as the evacuation spot...
attributes.name: Communicator

attributes.content: All areas progressing well. Gustave sends word from the Cloud restaurant's cockpit that Propeller Paradise will be within D.C. intercity net range in five minutes.
attributes.name: Agent

attributes.content: Your orders, sir?
attributes.name: Agent

attributes.content: Anyone seen those two newbies from Bravo?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: The ones responsible for that Banshee? Positioning shows they're still on Platform 3. That's not in the plan's operation range. Should we send someone to check it out?
attributes.name: Agent

attributes.content: Seems like their mission's been 'taken over'.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Platform 3 is far from the detonation target, so don't worry about that. I'll handle it later.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: All teams, sync chronos. Phase two begins now.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: The jail cell window crops the sky into a tiny square.
The ordinary yet mysterious 'tree', centerpiece of Nasti's research, and Rhine Lab's core project, is now hidden from her view by strangely clothed figures and floating balloons.

In a few minutes, the expo broadcast will begin, without Nasti's involvement. Her bone pen and mechanical devices were seized earlier, so all she needs to do now is to play the role of a helpless sinner.
If Muelsyse were here, she'd probably summon eight water clones to scold her for being silly. But Nasti does not regret her decision, though there is one woman on her mind.
Væla leaving the Convallis had always left her uneasy. If the chance came...
Who's that?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Director Lunorey, you have to follow me to the tree platform!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You're supposed to be keeping the device data and core code safe. What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: But the 'tree' is growing now!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: ...'Growing'? That's impossible.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: So that's not supposed to happen... If it affects the levitation module, it'll definitely be dangerous to anyone on the ground.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The levitation module runs independently, with a backup power supply that can last for five days. But the abnormality you mentioned... the only way to find out why it's happening is to go inside the 'tree'.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Come with me, Director.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The security cams have been rigged with a delayed feed that should buy us at least twenty minutes, and I'm not sure why, but the cell's smart locks are unlocked, so now's—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: That's because the chief executive of 'Propeller Paradise' opened them for you.
Gordon?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: What's... all that on you? A DIY high-altitude face shield, modified propellers, and a second-hand insulated spacesuit?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Did you loot them from the park's scrap and recycle plant?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Your distorted testimony at the hearing is still up on the park's bulletin board, but now you're helping us escape...? Don't tell me you've had a sudden attack of conscience?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Nasti, I got your bone pen and devices here. Sorry about the hearing.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'd rather stand in the defendant's dock with you than recite that prepared speech—after all, the confiscated devices were my goods anyways, so I'll take the blame for that.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: ...Who are you and what have you done with Gordon Tannen?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: What happened?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: My dear citizens of D.C., and those watching this live broadcast, it is my honor to introduce Propeller Paradise, an experimental park that is sure to leave its mark on Columbian history!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: We don't have much time.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Nasti, you've done deals with Gustave. I'm sure you won't doubt the intel I'm about to hand over.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Your old boss is planning something with Maylander, correct?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You're even sharper than I thought.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Seeing the park's chief executive here when he's supposed to be making a speech in half an hour is proof enough.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Friends, look out your windows, up at the sky. No amount of marketing bluster can compare to what you'll see with your own eyes, where the future among the clouds is waiting for you!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: They want to can the expo with an accident that'll kill the future of Propeller Paradise, though I've no idea exactly what their plan is.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: If Maylander's involved, they'll move fast.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What was that?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: God, am I seeing things? Something's falling from the levitation layer—Is that the Lucky Cystybeast's floating pod?!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: No, there's more! Three... four... Is this part of the opening ceremony? They didn't mention this in the script! If they really come crashing down—
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Wait! The pods stopped falling? As if something's gripping them firmly...
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Huh? What was that? Oh, oh! It seems the tech companies have prepared a surprise that even got me!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: We have just witnessed Propeller Paradise's breakthrough in the field of levitation, with no need for papers or data, and this is only just the beginning!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: No way, there's no emergency stop module—even in ongoing projects—that could've done that...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Sky, your field measurements are more precise. Where were the falling pods supposed to land?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: From visual estimates, they would have probably crashed into Platform 2, blocking the connecting lower layer tunnel—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: That's the only path we can take to the tree.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Gordon, I accept your apology, but I have no time for your plans.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: That miracle was no stroke of luck. Might have something to do with you and your invention?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Is that a threat?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Just my intuitive judgment on all rule-breaking.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I don't need your help with Gustave, but I do need a bargaining chip to make sure Propeller Paradise stays afloat when everything's done and dusted.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: So my tree...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Letting you handle something only you know how to handle is part of my plan.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Got it. Rhine Lab staff will cooperate with you.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: However. Whatever it is you're planning to do, go to the tree at the first sign of danger and I'll come get you.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Everything ready, Five-Four?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Preparations complete.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Let's go. I have an opening speech to make.
attributes.name: Gordon
